text: I'm Matthew Barnett from the class of 2019.
And I'm Jeremy Wilder also from the class of 2019.
This past summer we traveled 10,000 miles around the United States interviewing 16 entrepreneurs in 12 different cities
And we wanted to share with you the top 5 pieces of advice we learned along the way.
Number 1 comes from a journalism entrepreneur in the city of Chicago.
Number 2 comes from a data entrepreneur in Seattle.
Who told us to find a community for support like a mentor to help you along the way.
Number 3 comes from a film entrepreneur in L.A..
Because no one is going to do it for you.
Number 4 comes from a manufacturing entrepreneur in Austin Texas.
Who told us to work in the field and get some valuable experience before you start.
Number 5 comes from a tech entrepreneur in Tampa.
Who said use data in your marketing and decision-making.
And there you have it our 5 best pieces of advice.
Now you don't have to travel 10,000 miles to get great advice.
Because we did it for you.
